users.bio: Passionate about saving our planet one challenge at a time!
Environmental Studies major. Love hiking and sustainability!
Senior year = going all out for the environment! 🌍

updates.title: New Recycling Bins on Campus
updates.content: Trinity has installed 20 new recycling stations across campus. Look for the green bins near all academic buildings!

updates.title: Bike Share Program Launches
updates.content: Free bike rentals are now available for students. Pick up at the library and return to any campus station.

updates.title: Community Garden Open for Spring
updates.content: Sign up to get your own plot in the campus community garden. Fresh veggies and good vibes await!
